_comment: Deal-specific overrides for the CMBS Reporting Tool. Edit this file (not cmbs_config.py) to add or change deal mappings.

folder_overrides._comment: Key = Transaction ID (exactly as in IRP, case-sensitive). Value = full path to the DEAL folder on production (not the CREFC subfolder). The tool still scans inside for CREFC/CREFCs/etc.
folder_overrides.MSC 2021-L5: S:\Lenders\KeyBank\Reporting\1--ACTIVE POOLS\5 -- MSC 2021-L5 (K2H Airpark and Little Boston)

filename_overrides._comment: Key = Transaction ID (as in IRP). Value = string used in CREFC filenames on disk when it differs from the IRP Transaction ID.
